text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look at all this snow! That's a long climb to be carrying
precious cargo...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer told me that this was a trial to help me find my strengths. Not
to mention, McQueen is waiting for this generator at the summit.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: All righty! She helped me out at the scrimmage, so now it's my turn!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well then, all that is left for us is to wait. I'm quite surprised. I never expected someone to ask for such eccentric training with this much fervor.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I suppose this is proof of how badly you wish to discover Kita's
abilities... However, she will not complete her journey.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Climbing a snowy mountain with a generator in tow is a task that
would exhaust most Umamusume by the third station. And since Kita
hasn't even debuted yet...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... So... heavy... This might be tougher... than carrying portable shrines.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But... I won't give up. This mountain won't beat me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Taking Kita's current faculties into account... I believe she will make it
up to the fifth station.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Though as she is now, she possesses no exceptional abilities.
Still... I sense something within her that I cannot express in words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Something akin to natural talent. That alone will bring her to the
fourth station, and her fortitude will bring her to the fifth. But that's
it. Still, it's plenty respectable.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Getting dizzy... I'm only about halfway, too. Is this... my limit?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... went out of their way to arrange this training for me.
McQueen's waiting for me. Can I... stop here?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(No, I have to keep going. I have to return the favor. Dad and his
pupils would never leave a debt unpaid.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Repay your debts. Put one foot in front of the other. If I'm not going
all out, all the time, then I'm not being true to myself! All righty...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Haaaaah! I won't give up heeere! I'll keep going—going all out—until
the very end! Hi-yaaah, grrr-raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The sun has already begun to set... It is about time for us to bring this
to a close.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In all likelihood, Kita has retired near the fifth station. I will contact
my support staff and have them bring her down to the base camp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is the matter? Something happen?
choice_data_list: I never doubted her for a second.
I never doubted her for a second.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: McQueen, sorry for being late! Here's... your generator! Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: K-Kita! You made it here... all by yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It was way tougher than I expected though, so it took me some
time. Hopefully, I've returned the favor a little bit now!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, thanks for letting me do this! So, um... do you think you've
figured out what my strengths are?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to this rather intense trial, Kitasan Black's strengths are clear
to me now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has the physique to climb a mountain with heavy baggage, the
recovery speed to rely on only short breaks, and the will to never give
up. In other words...
choice_data_list: Your strength is your unyielding grit!
Your strength is your unyielding grit!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Grit! So that's my strength!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There is no doubt about it. I have never seen an Umamusume with the
grit to complete a mission as ridiculous as this one.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. But, will grit be useful during races? It doesn't have to do
much with speed, right?
choice_data_list: We're going to utilize it before you race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Before she races? If it involves preparing for a race... Ah! I believe I
understand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You wish to have Kita go through rigorous training, during which she
can create her own secret weapon, correct? Just like Bourbon did?
choice_data_list:
Exactly! Let's make a weapon just for you,
Kitasan!

Exactly! Let's make a weapon just for you,
Kitasan!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Sounds good to me! Train me to your heart's content! I want to
become someone who'll never lose again—ever!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer, McQueen, thank you both so much! I feel like I'm starting to see the light at the end of the tunnel!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm going to train like crazy and develop my own weapon—something only I can use. And once I have that, I want to try it out in a race against her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I want to see if my weapon will work against my idol—Tokai Teio!
